Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 19 

BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 

LABEL: Reference Year 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the reference year of the enrollment data. 

SHORT NAME: RFRNC_YR 

LONG NAME: BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: CMS Enrollment Database (EDB) 

VALUES: 1999–current data year 

COMMENT: The data files are partitioned into calendar year files. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
